submission.subject: Onboarding documentation needed for our new subsidiary entity
submission.description: Hi Vendor Management, we are onboarding our new subsidiary 'Acme Industrial Logistics Pvt Ltd' as a separate vendor. Could you share the standard onboarding pack (registration form, NDA template, payment terms, integration guide) and the typical timeline from doc submission to vendor-id issue? Existing parent vendor id is V-001.

submission.subject: Vendor record migration after legal entity merger
submission.description: Effective 2026-04-01 our two existing entities (V-001 and V-014) have legally merged into a single entity 'Acme Industrial United'. Open POs and invoices exist on both vendor IDs. What is the recommended migration path — single new vendor record, retain V-001 and absorb V-014, or run them in parallel during a transition period? Need a call with vendor-management.
